St. George Lycabettus

★★★★★
🏛️ Acropolis View🍸 Rooftop Bar👑 Luxury
from €250 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Hillside luxury hotel with stunning city views. Rooftop pool and Le Grand Balcon restaurant.

Who Should Consider St. George Lycabettus

St. George Lycabettus is a 5-star luxury price-signal hotel in Kolonaki, with an Acropolis-view signal and a rooftop-bar signal. It is tagged for luxury, views, quiet.

  • Compare the area on the Kolonaki hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • Compare it with other Athens rooftop bar hotels.

PoolSpaRestaurantGym

✓ Pros

  • Amazing views
  • Rooftop pool
  • Quiet area

✗ Cons

  • Uphill walk
  • Away from sites

Location

Located in Kolonaki, 15-20 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 15-20 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro
